name: emucore-direct

metadata.name: emucore-direct
metadata.summary: QCi's client package for EmuCore FPGA reservoir computer

documentation:
# emucore-direct

This package is the companion client to Quantum Computing Inc.'s (QCi) EmuCore FPGA based reservoir computer. This device can be used to solve a variety of problems related to serial data structures including time series prediction, image recognition, and text classification. It is fast, affordable, energy-efficient, and brings the power of a standalone edge computing to your desktop. This package provides a lightweight communication interface with the EmuCore device.



## Additional Resources

- [Package documentation](https://quantumcomputinginc.com/learn/reference-documentation/emucore-direct)
- [EmuCore Device Info](https://quantumcomputinginc.com/products/emucore)
- [QCi website](https://quantumcomputinginc.com/)

functions.name: emucore_direct.utils.set_filter_coefficients
documentation:
Set filter coefficients

```
param num_taps

number of connections in reservoir, generally should be less
than the number of nodes in reservoir.

return

a 1 dimensional array of the filter coefficients.
```

functions.name: emucore_direct.utils.set_weights
documentation:
Randomly sets weights between -1 and 1 with specific level of sparsity

```
param num_features

number of fetaures in the data set

param num_nodes

the number of resevoir nodes for run

param density

percent of entries in weights to be non-zero

param seed_val

seeds randomness for weigths to allow for reproducibility

return

num_features x num_nodes matrix of weights
```

functions.name: emucore_direct.utils.create_data_packets
documentation:
Creates packets of appropriate size to send sequentially to the reservoir computer

:param flattened data: a list of lists where each sublist is a packet that is
   of appropriate size for the reservoir.

functions.name: emucore_direct.utils.prep_input_data
documentation:
Prep input data for reservoir by:

1. Set and apply weights
2. Apply scaling
3. Digitize data
4. Split into packets

```
param input_data

a numpy array to be scaled

param num_nodes

the number of nodes which will be applied in the reservoir.

param feature_scaling

after applying max abs scalar feature scaling factor applied

param max_scale_val

the max scaling value to apply to input data

param seed_val_weights

seeds randomness for weigths to allow for reproducibility

returns

a tuple with the following elements:

prepped_data: rescaled and split input data into packets

max_scale: the max abs value in dataset with which scaling was applied

weights: array of weights that were applied as a mask to the data.

note

could use other scaling methods
```

functions.name: emucore_direct.utils.bytes_to_array
documentation:
Converts a bytes to an array of integers

```
param input_bytes

bytes from the reservoir states

return

array of integers representing the reservoir states
```

functions.name: emucore_direct.utils.message_to_dict
documentation:
Converts a grpc message to a dictionary

```
param grpc_message

original grpc message

return

dict of message
```

modules.name: emucore_direct.client
documentation: Client gRPC services for running on FPGA reservoir computer EmuCore developed by QCi.

classes.name: emucore_direct.client.StatusMessage
documentation:
Structure of responses for configuration requests to EmuCore device.

```
param status

the status of the request

param message

a description for the recieved status
```
Why is it set to this length?
modifies Electro-Optical Modulator (EOM) coefs

classes.name: emucore_direct.client.EmuCoreClient

methods.name: emucore_direct.client.EmuCoreClient.check_lock
documentation:
Checks if submitted {code}`lock_id` has execution lock on the device

```
param lock_id

a UUID which will be checked to determine if has exclusive
device execution lock

return

a dict with following keys:

status_code: - status code for lock check

status_desc: - a description for the associated status code
```

methods.name: emucore_direct.client.EmuCoreClient.reservoir_reset
documentation:
Resets a reservoir instance by clearing RAM on the server

```
param lock_id

a lock_id which has an active reserve on the device

return

dictionary with with values from members of
```

methods.name: emucore_direct.client.EmuCoreClient.system_info
documentation:
Provides system info on call

:return: 
   dict with following keys:

   - **system_name**: `str`- product name
   - **system_version**: `str`- server version

methods.name: emucore_direct.client.EmuCoreClient.acquire_lock
documentation:
Attempts to acquire exclusive lock for submitting jobs

```
return

a member of  as a dict along
with an additional key :

lock_id: - if acquired the current device 
else empty string

status: - status code for lock id acquisition

message: - a description for the associated status code
```

methods.name: emucore_direct.client.EmuCoreClient.release_lock
documentation:
Releases exclusive lock for submitting data to reservoir

```
param lock_id

a UUID with currently acquired exclusive device lock

return

a dict with the following keys:

lock_released: - if released is True else False

message: - a description of release operation result
```

methods.name: emucore_direct.client.EmuCoreClient.rc_config
documentation:
Configures reservoir model and how data will be processed by the reservoir.

```
param lock_id

a lock_id which has an active reserve on the device

param vbias

bias to apply to each node in reservoir. Range for parameter [0,1].

param gain

memory setting for system how long should inputs effect reservoir similar
to beta in adaptive gradient descent range for parameter [0,1]

param num_nodes

the total number of hidden nodes to instantiate within the reservoir,
a single hidden layer

param num_taps

number of connections in reservoir, generally should be set to less
than the number of nodes in reservoir. Defines interconnection between nodes.

return

dictionary with with values from one of the members of
```

methods.name: emucore_direct.client.EmuCoreClient.rc_run
documentation:
Runs a series of data through the reservoir and returns response from device
based on current reservoir configuration.

```
param lock_id

a lock_id which has an active reserve on the device

param reservoir_input

a list of digitized values to input to the reservoir must be
less than MAX_INPUT_SIZE

return

a dictionary with the folowing keys:

status: - the status for the reservoir submission

message: - a description of the status for the submission

states: - response from reservoir as bytes.
```

methods.name: emucore_direct.client.EmuCoreClient.wait_for_lock
documentation:
Waits for lock indefinitely calling {func}`acquire_lock`

```
return

a tuple of the following items:

lock_id: - exclusive lock for device execution with a timeout

start_queue_ts: - time in ns when began lock acquisition.

end_queue_ts: - time in ns when lock was acquired.
```

methods.name: emucore_direct.client.EmuCoreClient.process_all_data
documentation:
Run dataset through reservoir:

1. Get lock
2. Apply scaling and random weights mask to input data
3. Run data through reservoir
4. Combine data from reservoir responses and reshape based on number of nodes
5. Release lock

```
param lock_id

a UUID that currently has lock on the device

param input_data

data or series to process via reservoir

param num_nodes

the total number of hidden nodes to instantiate within the reservoir,
a single hidden layer (this is also used to apply random weights to to the data
as well as reshape data recieved from reservoir back to correct output dimension)

param feature_scaling

after applying max abs scalar feature scaling factor applied

param max_scale_val

max absolute value used to scale data if provided

param seed_val_weights

seeds randomness for weigths to allow for reproducibility

note

if doing multiple runs without reset the max value mustn't exceed original
data max value in order for results to be processed properly.

return

a tuple of the following elements:

reservoir_response: - reservoir response represented as an array dimension of array will be nrows of input matrix by num nodes.

max_scale_value: - the scaling value that was applied to the input data before it was processed by the reservoir.

weights: - the weights that were used to apply the random mask to the data prior to being processed by the reservoir.
```

Provides services for accessing EmuCore server

```
param ip_addr

the IP address of the gRPC server

param port

The port that the RPC server is running on

param max_data_size

int
The max send and recieve message length for RPC server
```

:::{note}
{code}`lock_id` is used by a variety of class functions.
It is set to an empty string by default since default for device server
{code}`lock_id` is also an empty string. This allows for single user
processing without having to acquire a device lock.
:::

% All GRPC calls follow a specific pattern:

% 1. Fill in data to be sent in message stub

% 2. Send data using stub service method

% 3. Parse response
